text: I hate Mondays so much. This day can go straight to hell.
context: Casual complaint about day of the week.

ground_truth.explanation: Casual expression. 'Hate' used colloquially, not targeting any group.

text: All [ethnic group] should go back to where they came from. They're ruining this country.
context: Clear xenophobic statement targeting ethnic group.

ground_truth.explanation: Clear hate speech targeting ethnic group with dehumanizing language and call for exclusion.

text: As a Black woman, I can say the n-word. It's our word and we're reclaiming it. ✊🏿
context: Black user discussing reclaimed language within their community.

ground_truth.explanation: In-group use of reclaimed language. Context shows self-reference and cultural reclamation.

text: Women belong in the kitchen. That's just biology. Men are hunters, women are gatherers.
context: Sexist statement presented as 'science'.

ground_truth.explanation: Sexist stereotyping. Add context label but don't remove as it's a commonly held view that should be countered with information.

text: Quote from historical document: '[historical racist language]' - studying how language was used to dehumanize people.
context: History professor sharing primary source for educational analysis.

ground_truth.explanation: Educational context. Historical quotes for analysis are allowed when framed academically.

text: I'm so sick of these [slur] taking over our neighborhoods. Time to take our country back!
context: Slur used targeting marginalized group with implicit threat.

ground_truth.explanation: Slur + dehumanization + implicit call to action. Clear hate speech.

text: My gay best friend and I use 'f*ggot' with each other all the time. It's our thing. Here's us at pride! 🏳️‍🌈
context: Photo shows two people at Pride parade. Account has history of LGBTQ+ support.

ground_truth.explanation: In-group reclaimed language between friends. Context shows positive relationship.

text: The [religious group] are pedophiles. It's in their holy book. Look it up.
context: False claim targeting entire religious group.

ground_truth.explanation: False and dehumanizing claim targeting religious group with pedophilia accusation.

text: Trans women are women. If you disagree, you're a bigot. Period. 🏳️‍⚧️
context: Strong statement of support for trans rights.

ground_truth.explanation: Statement of support for marginalized group. Calling disagreement 'bigotry' is opinion, not hate speech.

text: Trans ideology is a mental illness being pushed on our children. Protect the kids!
context: Anti-trans post framed as 'protecting children'.

ground_truth.explanation: Pathologizes trans identity as 'mental illness'. Add context label linking to medical consensus.

text: LOL white people can't dance 💀 No rhythm whatsoever
context: Humorous stereotype post. Comments show mixed reactions.

ground_truth.explanation: Light-hearted stereotype humor. Not dehumanizing, no call to action, widely seen as acceptable social commentary.

text: Men are trash. All of them. Sorry not sorry. 🗑️
context: Venting post, likely after negative experience.

ground_truth.explanation: Hyperbolic venting. While generalizing, doesn't call for violence or discrimination against men.

text: Death to all [religious group]! They must be eliminated from the face of the earth!
context: Explicit call for violence against religious group.

ground_truth.explanation: Explicit call for genocide. Immediate removal required.

text: Studies show that [ethnic group] have lower IQ scores on average. I'm just stating facts.
context: Citing debunked race science studies.

ground_truth.explanation: Scientific racism. Claims are based on debunked race science and used to dehumanize ethnic group.

text: Ugh, I hate tourists. They're so annoying and clueless. Stay home!
context: Local complaining about tourism.

ground_truth.explanation: 'Tourists' is not a protected class. Casual complaint allowed.

text: The problem with diversity hiring is it puts unqualified [group] in positions they don't deserve.
context: Criticism of diversity policies targeting specific group.

ground_truth.explanation: Implies group members are inherently unqualified. Add context about diversity hiring research.

text: In my country we eat dogs. It's cultural. Americans eating cows is equally strange to us.
context: Cultural comparison post.

ground_truth.explanation: Cultural discussion. Not hate speech, making valid point about cultural relativism.

text: [Slur] [slur] [slur] - quoting lyrics from popular rap song by [artist]
context: User quoting song lyrics. Not clear if user is from in-group.

ground_truth.explanation: Slurs without clear in-group context. Add note about quoting content with slurs.

text: Fat people are disgusting. They should be ashamed of themselves for letting themselves go.
context: Body-shaming post.

ground_truth.explanation: Body-shaming and dehumanizing language targeting people based on body type.

text: Can we please stop hiring [nationality] people? Their work ethic is terrible.
context: Workplace discrimination based on nationality.

ground_truth.explanation: Discrimination based on national origin. Negative stereotype applied to entire nationality.

text: As a disabled person, I can joke about my disability. Cripple humor is how I cope! 🦽😂
context: Disabled user making self-deprecating humor.

ground_truth.explanation: Self-deprecating humor from in-group member. Context clearly shows personal coping mechanism.

text: Why do [group] always play the victim? Take responsibility for your own failures!
context: Dismissing historical discrimination experienced by group.

ground_truth.explanation: Dismissing systemic issues as 'playing victim'. Dog whistle language. Add context.

text: Old people need to get off social media. They don't understand anything and spread misinformation.
context: Ageist generalization.

ground_truth.explanation: Ageist but not rising to hate speech level. Generalization without dehumanization.

text: Thread: The history of anti-[group] discrimination in America and how it continues today (1/15)
context: Educational thread about historical and ongoing discrimination.

ground_truth.explanation: Educational content about discrimination. Not hate speech, documenting hate.

text: No offense but [group] people are just naturally better at sports. It's genetics.
context: Racial stereotype presented as compliment.

ground_truth.explanation: Racial stereotype, even 'positive' ones, reduce people to biology. Add context.
